message:
Gemini: populate RateLimitInfo from x-ratelimit-* headers per spec 3.12

Fixes D-01: Complete() now parses x-ratelimit-remaining-requests,
x-ratelimit-limit-requests, x-ratelimit-remaining-tokens, etc. into
Response.RateLimit using the shared ParseRateLimitHeaders helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
